channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Iranian Forces Claim to Seize 2 Ships After Trump Extends Truce
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards seized two cargo ships near the Strait of Hormuz, state media reported. The incident occurred as President Trump renewed a cease-fire, with both sides seeking control in the waterway.

item.title: Iran Claims to Seize 2 Ships Near Strait of Hormuz After Trump Extends Truce
item.description: Iranian forces seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. The incident occurred after a cease-fire extension. Iran War Live Updates: Iranian Forces Claim Seizure of 2 Ships Near Strait of Hormuz After Trump Extends Cease-Fire The New York Times.

item.title: Three Ships Attacked in Strait of Hormuz, Escorting Two to Its Coast
item.description: Three ships were attacked in the Strait of Hormuz after the US extended a cease-fire and blockade. The incident occurred despite a 10-day truce brokered by the US, which is set to expire.

item.title: Banorte pushes cashless payments at Azteca as World Cup deadline nears
item.description: Mexico's Banorte is promoting cashless payments at its Azteca chain. The push comes as the World Cup deadline approaches. Banorte pushes cashless payments at Azteca as World Cup deadline nears.

item.title: US and Iran in blockade standoff as Pakistan pushes for talks
item.description: A standoff continues in the Strait of Hormuz between the US and Iran. Pakistan is urging talks to ease tensions. The mood in the Strait of Hormuz remains combustible despite Trump's ceasefire extension.

item.title: U.S.-Iran talks could be held in next three days, says Trump
item.description: US and Iran may hold talks within three days, President Trump said. Iran's Guards claim to have seized two ships attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz. Iran Guards say 'seized' two ships attempting to cross Strait of Hormuz; Iran says it has yet to decide whether to join a new round of talks with the U. S.

item.title: Culture and Conversation Tables Bring the World to Maxwell - Maxwell School of Citizenship and
item.description: Syracuse University's Maxwell School hosts Culture and Conversation Tables. The event brings together people from around the world. Culture and Conversation Tables Bring the World to Maxwell Maxwell School of Citizenship and Public Affairs.

item.title: EU Considers $106 Billion Loan to Ukraine, Delayed for Months by Orban
item.description: EU ambassadors meet to discuss a $106 billion loan to Ukraine, delayed by Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban's objections. After months of impasse because of objections from Prime Minister Viktor Orban of Hungary, ambassadors were meeting to discuss a key step on the way to disbursing the much-needed money.

item.title: Iran says it has seized two ships in strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire
item.description: Iran seized two ships in the Strait of Hormuz after the US extended a ceasefire. Middle East crisis live: Iran says it has seized two ships in strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire The Guardian.

item.title: Iran’s leaders debate war and peace after Trump ceasefire extension
item.description: Iran's leaders debate war and peace after Trump ceasefire extension, with some urging reason and moderation while state television pushes a line that Iranians want more war. State television pushes line that Iranians want more war, but others urge reason and moderation.

item.title: Tamil Nadu and West Bengal to decide their fate tomorrow | Above the Fold | 22.04.2016
item.description: Tamil Nadu and West Bengal will decide their fate tomorrow in Assembly elections, as attention turns to polling day, with other news including the Iran-Israel conflict and a court ruling in the 2006 Malegaon blast case.

item.title: London Marathon still in talks to stage 2027 race over two days
item.description: London Marathon organizers are still in talks to stage the 2027 race over two days, a decision that has not yet been finalized. London Marathon still in talks to stage 2027 race over two days.

item.title: Trump’s ‘good news’ teaser on Iran-US Round 2 peace talks
item.description: Trump teased "good news" on Iran-US Round 2 peace talks, but details of the negotiations remain unclear. Trump’s ‘good news’ teaser on Iran-US Round 2 peace talks.

item.title: Trump calls Iran’s leadership ‘fractured’. Is it, and who’s in charge?
item.description: Almost 53 days into the war, there is little evidence to suggest that Iran's government is fractured, despite Trump's claims to the contrary. Almost 53 days into war, there is little evidence suggesting that Iranian government is fragmented.

item.title: 34 Iran Tankers Slip Past US Hormuz Blockade, With Over $900 Million In Oil: Report
item.description: Thirty-four tankers linked to Iran have reportedly slipped past the US blockade in Hormuz, carrying over $900 million in oil. The incident has raised concerns about the effectiveness of the US blockade.

item.title: 2 Ships Attacked, Being Taken To Iran Amid US Stalemate: Report
item.description: Two ships, including the MSC Francesca, were attacked and seized, being taken to Iran amid a stalemate with the US. The incident has escalated tensions in the region. The MSC Francesca that has been seized and taken to Iran.

item.title: "Good News" On Talks With Iran Could Come By Friday: Trump
item.description: Trump expects good news on Iran talks by Friday. He made the statement publicly. "Good News" On Talks With Iran Could Come By Friday: Trump. Trump had previously indicated he would not extend the ceasefire.

item.title: Iranians are leaving the country just to access the internet
item.description: Iranians are traveling to Turkey to access the internet, as the country has been cut off from the global internet. They make video calls and then return home. Iran has cut off its access to the global internet.

item.title: Horror Russia-NATO war warning issued by European spy agency
item.description: A European spy agency has issued a warning about a potential war between Russia and NATO. The agency has raised concerns about the rising tensions between the two. Horror Russia-NATO war warning issued by European spy agency Daily Express.

item.title: EU Unveils 20th Sanctions Package on Russia: What’s Inside
item.description: The EU has imposed its 20th sanctions package on Russia. Details of the package are not specified. EU Unveils 20th Sanctions Package on Russia: What’s Inside Modern Diplomacy.
